name: soccer-js
description: Simple 2D retro isometric soccer game engine

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
scripts.test: npm run test:ai && npm run test:formations && npm run test:team-fsm && npm run test:pass-safety && npm run test:pass-lead && npm run test:through-balls && npm run test:first-touch && npm run test:chase-stickiness && npm run test:can-shoot && npm run test:support-spots && npm run test:ai-messages && npm run test:team-roles && npm run test:steering && npm run test:player-states && npm run test:pitch-regions && npm run test:goal-entity && npm run test:ball-prediction && npm run test:logic-regulator && npm run test:comfort-zone && npm run test:ai-params && npm run test:ai-debug && npm run test:request-pass && npm run test:defensive-shape && npm run test:positioning-policy && npm run test:marking && npm run test:play-phase && npm run test:counterpress && npm run test:set-pieces && npm run test:set-piece-resume && npm run test:freekick-wall && npm run test:sim && npm run test:gate && npm run test:goals && npm run test:headless && npm run test:scale && npm run test:projection && npm run test:bundle && npm run test:scrubber && npm run test:offside && npm run test:match-rules && npm run test:substitutions && npm run test:manual-control && npm run test:sounddb
